metadata.metric: Any Part Black Voting Age Population (APB VAP)
metadata.definition: Persons age 18 and over identifying as Black or African American alone OR in combination with one or more other races. The measure federal courts use in Section 2 Voting Rights Act cases.
metadata.geography: Georgia, by county, plus state total.
metadata.source_2020: U.S. Census Bureau, 2020 Decennial Census, PL 94-171 Redistricting Data Summary File, Table P3.
metadata.source_2010: U.S. Census Bureau, 2010 Decennial Census, PL 94-171 Redistricting Data Summary File, Table P3.
metadata.notes: Any-Part-Black VAP is the union of Black-alone (P3_004) and every multi-race cell that includes Black. State and county totals reconcile to the published Census file.
